issue_title: Nightly Release Failed for v0.49.0-nightly.20260624.g6e0bd68e4 on 2026-06-24
issue_body:
The nightly-release workflow failed. See the full run for details: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/actions/runs/28067292241

```text
> @google/gemini-cli-core@0.49.0-nightly.20260624.g6e0bd68e4 bundle:browser-mcp
> node scripts/bundle-browser-mcp.mjs

Error: Could not resolve "dotenv"
    packages/cli/src/config/settings.ts:10:24:
      10 │ import * as dotenv from 'dotenv';
         ╵                         ~~~~~~~~

Error: Could not resolve "comment-json"
    packages/cli/src/utils/commentJson.ts:8:33:
      8 │ import { parse, stringify } from 'comment-json';
        ╵                                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Error: Could not resolve "tinygradient"
    packages/cli/src/ui/themes/theme.ts:17:25:
      17 │ import tinygradient from 'tinygradient';
         ╵                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

gemini.js build failed: Error: Build failed with 19 errors:
packages/cli/src/commands/extensions/utils.ts:14:20: ERROR: Could not resolve "prompts"
packages/cli/src/config/extensions/extensionSettings.ts:9:24: ERROR: Could not resolve "dotenv"

npm error code 1
npm error command sh -c husky && npm run bundle
Error: Process completed with exit code 1.
```
notes: Created on July 1, 2026. Note: Currently (as of July 1) the agent has no capability of opening external URL links to inspect nightly CI failure logs. Added log snippet to issue_body for now; automated CI log link scraping will be a Post-MVP feature.
golden_spec_rationale: No source files were pruned; all PR modifications directly address the reported issue.

summary.problem: The nightly release workflow failed during the verify-release action setup.
summary.root_cause: The integration tests setup ran `npm ci` which triggered post-install or lifecycle scripts of dependencies. These scripts failed in the isolated action environment, causing the entire workflow to fail.
summary.context: The verify-release Github Action installs dependencies for integration tests prior to running them against the built NPM package.

steps: Open the GitHub Action configuration file at `.github/actions/verify-release/action.yml`.
Locate the step named 'Install dependencies for integration tests'.
Modify the `run` command of this step from `npm ci` to `npm ci --ignore-scripts`.

testing_strategy.expected_behavior: The integration test dependencies install successfully without running any lifecycle or post-install scripts.
verification_steps: Trigger or simulate the workflow locally or in a test run to ensure 'Install dependencies for integration tests' step executes `npm ci --ignore-scripts` and completes successfully.
